name: snaptask
description: Composable Codex skills for guided AI-agent Goal creation, independent Goal review, and decomposition into verifiable task cards.

interface.shortDescription: Create, review, and decompose AI-agent Goals
interface.longDescription: SnapTask guides users from rough intent to a complete AI-agent Goal, reviews whether that Goal is verifiable, bounded, safe, and complete, then decomposes approved work into low-conflict task cards.
defaultPrompt: Create a Goal through guided conversation.
Review this Goal before I decompose it.
Turn this approved Goal into AI-ready task cards.
